{{CargoClone
|name=Warlord Dong Zhuo
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=117
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=Resolver: W-tads extracted +9
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Troop Fire DMG +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Troop Fire DMG +1.5%
|}}
